title: penstemon heterodoxus subsp. cephalophorus
intro: Penstemon heterodoxus subsp. cephalophorus, also known as the Sierra beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Penstemon heterodoxus subsp. cephalophorus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
